name: Ramen
publisher: Happy Home Company, Happy Home Company
short_description: Operating Ramen Restaurant. Making various dishes, Manage and operate storefronts. Compete with other AI-controlled stores for regional rankings
detailed_description:
Ramen Shop

Operating Ramen Shop

Making delicious ramen noodles
Watching customers eat up their favorite dishes
And leave an empty plate

This is a very happy thing

  • ---------------------------------------------------------------------

  • 1) game is pixel style

  • 2) Exquisite storefront, you are free to set up shopfront.

  • 3) Delicate food styling, from cooking to end table

  • 4) Employing employees and cultivating employees

  • 5) Rich stories, diversified endings


  • Compete with other AI-controlled stores for regional rankings.
